concerns.text: Terminology inconsistency: User Story 1 uses 'Random-Forest regressor' (with hyphen) while FR-004 uses 'RandomForestRegressor' (camelCase, no hyphen). Both refer to the same concept but should use consistent naming throughout.
Terminology inconsistency: FR-001 uses 'Open Materials Database' while Assumptions section uses abbreviation 'OMDB'. Should use consistent full name or define abbreviation once and use consistently.
